blocks.value:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> Active
  Active --> Used
  Used --> Active: uses remain
  Used --> Exhausted: limit reached
  Active --> Expired
  Active --> Revoked
  Exhausted --> [*]
  Expired --> [*]
  Revoked --> [*]

stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> Open
  Open --> Open: contribute
  Open --> Completed
  Open --> Cancelled
  Cancelled --> Refunded
  Completed --> Audited
  Refunded --> Audited

caption.ru: Проверяйте invariant одного owner и server enforcement.
caption.en: Verify the exactly-one-owner invariant and server enforcement.

blocks.value:
flowchart LR
  C[Upload stream] --> Z[Actual size]
  Z --> M[Magic bytes/MIME]
  M --> N[Safe filename]
  N --> P[Room policy/quota]
  P -->|pass| S[Atomic store]
  P -->|fail| X[Delete temp + stable error]

caption.ru: MEDIA-02 · Encrypt, upload, claim and decrypt.
caption.en: MEDIA-02 · Encrypt, upload, claim and decrypt.

blocks.value:
sequenceDiagram
  participant C as Client
  participant S as Local Server
  C->>C: encrypt + hash ciphertext
  C->>S: upload ciphertext metadata
  S->>S: auth/scope/size/hash/policy/quota
  S-->>C: one-time claim
  C->>S: encrypted message reference
  C->>C: recipient decrypts

alt.ru: Waveform записи и playback progress без сообщения.
alt.en: Voice waveform and playback progress without message content.

caption.ru: Проверяйте amplitude reaction, stop/cancel and playback animation.
caption.en: Verify amplitude reaction, stop/cancel and playback animation.

caption.ru: MLS-01 · Device lifecycle and revoke cleanup.
caption.en: MLS-01 · Device lifecycle and revoke cleanup.

blocks.value:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> Registered
  Registered --> Verified
  Verified --> Active
  Active --> Revoked
  Revoked --> Cleanup
  Cleanup --> [*]

sequenceDiagram
  participant N as New device
  participant S as Server
  participant V as Verified group device
  N->>S: request Welcome
  S-->>V: mls.welcome_requested
  V->>S: scoped Welcome/commit
  S-->>N: one-time claim
  N->>N: validate group/epoch/transcript

caption.ru: PULSE-01 · Idempotent purchase and authoritative effect.
caption.en: PULSE-01 · Idempotent purchase and authoritative effect.

blocks.value:
sequenceDiagram
  participant C as Client
  participant S as Local Server
  participant P as Pulse Cloud
  C->>S: productId + Idempotency-Key
  S->>P: signed scoped request
  P->>P: ledger + duplicate detection
  P-->>S: entitlement/effect
  S->>S: validate effect/expiry
  S-->>C: authoritative result

alt.ru: Pulse purchase, entitlement and effect confirmation.
alt.en: Pulse purchase, entitlement and effect confirmation.

caption.ru: Проверяйте idempotency, expiry and no duplicate effect.
caption.en: Verify idempotency, expiry and no duplicate effect.
